ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_miles" TEXT /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_miles" TEXT /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "precinct_population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  "num_polling_stations" INTEGER /* Number of polling stations in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., U.S. House, Governor) */,
  "office_description" TEXT /* Description of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the district is located */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area_sq_miles" TEXT /* Area of the district in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "candidate_description" TEXT /* Description of the candidate */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., General, Primary) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the election is held */,
  "num_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters for the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "votes_election_day" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast on election day */,
  "votes_absentee" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes for the candidate in the precinct */,
  "votes_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of total votes for the candidate in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_results, edit_results) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
